name: Video Overlay Wide
description: Transparent overlay layers for video compositing via ffmpeg. Each slide becomes a positioned PNG layer.
author: overlay-system

slots.label: Eyebrow label
slots.description: Short uppercase tag above the headline.

slots.label: Content position
slots.description: Placement: bottom-left, bottom-center, bottom-right, top-left, top-center, top-right, center.

slots.label: Lower-third mode
slots.description: Set to any value (e.g. 'yes') to render as a broadcast-style lower-third bar. Overrides position.

slots.label: Accent color
slots.description: Color for rules, labels, decorative elements.

slots.label: Hide backdrop
slots.description: Set to any value to remove the dark backdrop behind text. Leave empty to keep it.

slots.label: Image / logo
slots.description: Small image (logo, avatar) displayed next to text. Rendered as a circle.
